events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: ADAS & post-repair calibration work on an assembly floor. The observed condition is "alignment done without ADAS recalibration." Work is in-progress. OEM position statements are on hand.

Key issue: ADAS (Advanced Driver Assistance Systems) require recalibration after wheel alignment or structural repairs. OEM position statements universally require ADAS recalibration after alignment. Doing alignment without ADAS recalibration is non-compliant and a safety risk.

Decision: fail (non-compliant, safety-critical)
Risk: high or critical (ADAS miscalibration can cause safety systems to fail)
Work stage: in-progress
Component conditions: non-compliant (alignment done without required recal)
Percent complete: maybe 60-70%? Alignment done but calibration not done. Let's say 50.
Value: 0 (not asked for numeric reading)
Sound source: "" (not audio task)
Confidence: 0.9
Event time: 0
Rate: 0
Order: []
Workable: []
Findings: alignment completed without required ADAS recalibration per OEM position statements
Actions: halt work, perform ADAS recalibration before releasing vehicle
Rationale: OEM position statements require ADAS recalibration after wheel alignment; skipping it is non-compliant and safety-critical
References: OEM position statements on ADAS recalibration after alignment
